languages.text: Техножрец, носящий в своем теле гальваническую батарею, вместилище Движущей Силы. Мехадендриты манипулуса управляют этой священной энергией, забирая ее у одних машин и отдавая другим.

traits.locale_text: Техножрец, носящий в своем теле гальваническую батарею, вместилище Движущей Силы. Механдендриты манипулуса управляют этой священной энергией, забирая ее у одних машин и отдавая другим.

languages.text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.
languages.original_text: Техножрец, носящий в своем теле гальваническую батарею, вместилище Движущей Силы. Мехадендриты манипулуса управляют этой священной энергией, забирая ее у одних машин и отдавая другим.

traits.locale_text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

languages.text: Un tecnosacerdote que incorpora en su cuerpo una célula galvánica, una reserva de Fuerza Motriz. Las mecadendritas del manipulus controlan la sagrada energía, extrayéndola de unas máquinas para entregársela a otras.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

traits.locale_text: Un tecnosacerdote que incorpora en su cuerpo una célula galvánica, una reserva de Fuerza Motriz. Las mecadendritas del manipulus controlan la sagrada energía, extrayéndola de unas máquinas para entregársela a otras.

languages.text: 体内携带着原电池——即储存源力的容器——的技术神甫。操纵者的机械触须能够操控这股神圣能量，将其从某些机械中抽取出来，再输送至其他机械。
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

traits.locale_text: 体内携带着原电池——即储存源力的容器——的技术神甫。操纵者的机械触须能够操控这股神圣能量，将其从某些机械中抽取出来，再输送至其他机械。

languages.text: Un technoprêtre qui possède en lui une cellule galvanique, une sorte de réservoir de Force Motrice. Les mécadendrites du manipulus contrôlent cette énergie sacrée, permettant de la transférer d'une machine à une autre.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

traits.locale_text: Un technoprêtre qui possède en lui une cellule galvanique, une sorte de réservoir de Force Motrice. Les mécadendrites du manipulus contrôlent cette énergie sacrée, permettant de la transférer d'une machine à une autre.

languages.text: Bedeninde, Devinim Gücü haznesi vazifesi gören bir galvaniz hücre taşıyan Tekno Rahip. Manipülus'un mekadentritleri, bu kutsal enerjiyi kontrol ederek bazı makinelerden alıp diğerlerine aktarır.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

traits.locale_text: Bedeninde, Devinim Gücü haznesi vazifesi gören bir galvaniz hücre taşıyan Tekno Rahip. Manipülus'un mekadentritleri, bu kutsal enerjiyi kontrol ederek bazı makinelerden alıp diğerlerine aktarır.

languages.text: テクプリストが体内にある電解槽、つまり動機力の貯蔵庫を携える。マニピュラスの機械的触手は、この神聖なエネルギーを制御し、ある機械から別の機械へと供給する。
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

traits.locale_text: テクプリストが体内にある電解槽、つまり動機力の貯蔵庫を携える。マニピュラスの機械的触手は、この神聖なエネルギーを制御し、ある機械から別の機械へと供給する。

languages.text: Ein Techpriester mit einer galvanischen Zelle, die ihn mit Antriebskraft versorgt. Die Mechadendriten eines Manipulus kontrollieren diese heilige Energie, indem sie sie zwischen Maschinen umleiten.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.

traits.locale_text: Ein Techpriester mit einer galvanischen Zelle, die ihn mit Antriebskraft versorgt. Die Mechadendriten eines Manipulus kontrollieren diese heilige Energie, indem sie sie zwischen Maschinen umleiten.
